The RCB skipper smashed nine sixes -- seven against pacers -- and now has 41 sixes this IPL season, with 27 coming against fast bowlers. Batting at No. 4, Patidar has scored 486 runs in 14 matches at a strike rate of 196.76, underlining his impact as one of RCB's most destructive middle-order batters.

title: 'That's a terrible question': Phillips loses cool during presser after defeat

When a reporter asked if GT had mentally given up while chasing 255, Phillips called it a “silly” and “terrible” question, insisting professional cricketers never quit. He admitted scoreboard pressure hurt GT after early wickets, but said the team must now stay calm and prepare for the Eliminator.

Amanda Nunes and Nina Nunes’ 2026 net worth and lifestyle
description: MMA power couple Amanda and Nina Nunes boast an estimated combined net worth of $5-7 million by 2026. Amanda's historic dual-division championship reign and lucrative UFC career, coupled with Nina's steady run and coaching, fueled their financial success.  Their investments and private lifestyle underscore a remarkable journey from combat sports to respected family life.

title: 'We can’t run Amazon the way NYC runs its school system': Jeff Bezos to Amazon users
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has sharply criticized New York City's public school spending, likening its inefficiencies to a poorly run business. He argued that substantial funds aren't reaching teachers, despite high per-student costs. Bezos also dismissed 'tax-the-rich' policies, advocating for identifying and solving root causes of economic struggles instead.

title: Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
description: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.
